title: DishForge: Your Personal Chef
description: *DishForge* is an **AI-powered application** that enhances cooking experiences by blending AI with culinary creativity. Created during a [Lablab Hackathon](https://lablab.ai/event/llama-2-hackathon-with-clarifai/rostisseries-delgado/dishforge), it allows users to interact effortlessly with AI to generate personalized recipes based on meal types, preferences, and available ingredients, utilizing image recognition, LLMs and image generation.

As the front-end developer, I focused on crafting the user interface, managing API integrations, and seamlessly presenting AI outputs. Our team **delivered this project in under 48 hours**, showcasing our ability to collaborate effectively and innovate rapidly.
